deals.title: Tilden 20ac - Steven Jimenez
deals.notes: 20 acre hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer dead - no earnest money received. Clearing complete. Lead with net after close on next offer.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. Price reduced to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social media.
Current offer dead. Steve more open to overall picture on offers.

deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utilities confirmed: Medina Electric and EMCSUD. Listing agreement needed to Jerry and Ray.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Drywall cut for trades. Utility info sent to Kelly.
On-site visit with Bryce. Work moving forward.
Work officially starting with Matt Toney.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K. Double-carrying $5,300-6,000/month. Three paths identified. Where Things Stand email sent.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Three options presented. Option 3 highlighted.
Stopped by property. Lawn care referrals obtained.
Outside showing at 2pm. Buyer feedback pending.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Relocating to NC, June deadline. List price $259,900. First showing 9:15am May 14. Insurance adjuster out May 11 - roof claim approved.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof/fascia replacement pending.

logs.m: MLS live. First showing feedback received. Cultural concerns noted.
Insurance adjuster completed inspection. Roof claim moving forward.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/development opportunity. Title defect identified - incomplete legal description. Isaac interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer). Sisters enthusiastic about development angle.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement. Confirm sisters decision on extension. Discuss Isaac offer.

logs.m: Isaac development expanded to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT partnership potential.
Title defect confirmed. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
Isaac development interest discussed. Sisters excited about venture.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: New Lennar home in Grace Gardens. Owner plans 2-year rental then occupy. 1,535 sqft 3BR/2BA. Recommended rent $1,595/month. Listing agreement must go out today.
deals.next: Finalize listing terms with Jimbo. Send Skyslope packet for signatures.

logs.m: 12 open items identified. Email sent to Jimbo with questions and recommendations.
CMA analysis completed. List price $1,595/month recommended.
Spoke with Jimbo. Ready to move forward. Son made flyers.

leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, recently moved from Ohio, looking to buy. VA loan eligible.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife for VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Christina Shine - 13810 Tangle Tree
leads.detail: Met May 9 at garden event. Has property 90 percent complete. Currently with another realtor. Open to selling as-is or finishing. Pre-market opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing work progress. Offer to promote listing.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed. Son now owns house. Avid gardener. Not yet contacted. Probate opportunity.
leads.next: Get son name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out with empathy and garden angle.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F - Community Contact
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration. Real estate potential through trust.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story. Keep nurturing.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Fixer Buyer
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending from Jerome.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full buyer and property details.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell - Buyers
leads.detail: Rental being sold, rents going up. Need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA required. Rate buydowns and incentives angle.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction search. Identify builders.

leads.title: Colton & Abby Brown
leads.detail: Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell Moore TX. Colton looking for work - contractor angle on 181 CR 7751.
leads.next: Reach out to Colton. Confirm listing timeline. Offer 181 CR 7751 job. Get quote.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer - New Construction Buyer
leads.detail: Brandon Morann mom. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Buyer rep signed May 7. Inventory being pulled. Rate buydown strategy critical.
leads.next: Follow up on builder options. Confirm timeline. Schedule model home visits.

leads.title: Isaac Linares - Investor/Developer
leads.detail: Linares Capital LLC. Interested in Borregas development - mobile homes with half units for displaced veterans. Offering ~$150K contingent on project moving forward. Josh LT partnership potential.
leads.next: Connect Isaac and Josh LT. Coordinate on Borregas development. Confirm offer timeline.

leads.title: Brandon Moran - Rental & Buyer Lead
leads.detail: Long-standing contact. Green Bliss rental listing (8527) for uncle Jimbo. Mom (Milagros) is new construction buyer. Critical to register as buyer agent on first builder visit.
leads.next: Confirm visit date with Brandon and mom. Call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 ahead.
